ddt:Target.Name: VADA_C1A_V0_Builder_Public
ddt:Target.Description:
DED/DDT for VADA ECU 15/40 Projects
Draft Version
Compatible from SW5.00 (C1A architecture adaptation)
DDT .xml version extract from EDT VADA_V3_2013_08_26.pdx DDT .xml version corresponding to EDT VADA_V5_2014_10_28.pdx
Versions history :
V0 : adaptation to new VADA SW for C1A architecture (CMF1-ph2 projects) - Screen updates (unused DID colored in grey temporarly => to be removed in next versions, after validation) - Data updates (name, size, unit, res, offset) for CAN parameters to align with new MSG set - Request updates (for received data : number of bytes, bit position) Some DID and associated data have to be removed in next versions. It is kept in V0 for validation purpose.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information. Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number. Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the VIN number. Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer. It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description: This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number. Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number. Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU. It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer. Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Description: The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number. Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description: This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number. Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: ActuatorsOutput_Status
Data.Description: ActuatorsOutput_Status : The state management analyses all the input necessary for VADA system (CAN data, supply level, internal defect, etc…), and give an order to the applicative depending the result of this analyse by sending the parameter "ActuatorsOutput_Status". The applicative have to applied this order.

Data.Name: External_Control
Data.Description: This data indicate if the external control is applied or not. This data will permit to built the data CAN output data send by VADA : « DampingRequest_ACK »

Item.Text: No demand from external damping control (Diag)
Nok to an external damping control demand
Demand from external damping control satisfied

Data.Name: Nnx_barps_HighMCPressureSpdThd
Data.Description: Applicative parameter : Nnx_barps_HighMCPressureSpdThd This is one of the four theshold that enable the ouput command of the dynamic longi subsystem when it's reach. High threshold checking the Master cylinder pressure derived signal.

Data.Name: Nnx_barps_LowMCPressureSpdThd
Data.Description: Applicative parameter : Nnx_barps_LowMCPressureSpdThd. This is one of the four theshold that enable the ouput command of the dynamic longi subsystem when it's reach. Low threshold checking the Master cylinder pressure derived signal.

Data.Name: Nnx_deg_SteeringWheelAngleThd
Data.Description: Applicative parameter : Nnx_deg_SteeringWheelAngleThd This is the theshold that enable the ouput command of the stabilized bend subsystem when it's reach.

Data.Name: Nnx_degps_HighStrWhlRotSpdThd
Data.Description: Applicative parameter : Nnx_degps_HighStrWhlRotSpdThd This is the first high theshold that enable the ouput command of the dynamic bend subsystem when it's reach.

Data.Name: Nnx_degps_LowStrWhlRotSpdThd
Data.Description: Applicative parameter : Nnx_degps_LowStrWhlRotSpdThd This is the first low theshold that enable the ouput command of the dynamic bend subsystem when it's reach.

Data.Name: Nnx_mA_DynamSatMin

Data.Name: Nnx_mA_SportSatMin

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_CutFreqLoadEstHigh
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_CutFreqLoadEstHigh : Cutoff frequency when the charg estimator filtering is authorised. Both for the 1 and 2 sensor estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_CutFreqLoadEstLow
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_CutFreqLoadEstLow : Cutoff frequency when the charg estimator filtering isn't authorised. Both for the 1 and 2 sensor estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreq1
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreq1 : Cut frequency of the High Pass filter 1implemented in the High Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreq2
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreq2 : Cut frequency of the High Pass filter 2 implemented in the High Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreqSlp
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadHPassCutFreqSlp : Cut frequency of the High Pass Slip filter implemented in the High Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadLPassCutFreqSlp
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_HFBadRoadLPassCutFreqSlp : Cut frequency of the Low Pass Slip filter implemented in the High Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadHPassCutFreq1
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadHPassCutFreq1 : Cut frequency of the High Pass filter 1 implemented in the Low Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadHPassCutFreqSlp
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadHPassCutFreqSlp : Cut frequency of the High Pass Slip filter implemented in theLow Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadLPassCutFreq1
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadLPassCutFreq1 : Cut frequency of the Low Pass filter 1 implemented in the Low Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadLPassCutFreqSlp
Data.Description: Nnx_Hz_LFBadRoadLPassCutFreqSlp : Cut frequency of the Low Pass Slip filter implemented in the Low Frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_Map_BRCorrectAct
Data.Description: Nnx_Map_BRCorrectAct : MAP configuration parameter. Activation of the bad road correction function.

Data.Name: Nnx_Map_BRHighWayDependency
Data.Description: Nnx_Map_BRHighWayDependency :MAP configuration parameter. Activate the dependency of the highway detection to the badroad correction.

Data.Name: Nnx_Map_HighWayComfortAct
Data.Description: Nnx_Map_HighWayComfortAct : MAP configuration parameter. Activate the HighWayConfort function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bar_BrakPressChargeThresh
Data.Description: Nnx_bar_BrakPressChargeThresh : Threshold on the Vxx_est_bar_BrakingPressure signal. It define one of the 4 filter authorisation conditions apply on the charg estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_4WSIntersystemFunctAct
Data.Description: MAP configuration parameter. This parameter active the 4WS_Intersystem function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_ChargThresh
Data.Description: Threshold use to check the signal Vxx_est_class_Charge to know if the charg estimator detect a charged vehicule. Use in the function HighWayRemoveCmd.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_ESPInRegFunctionAct
Data.Description: MAP configuration parameter. Active the ESPInRegulation function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_ExtESCControlActivFunc
Data.Description: This parameter allow the ESC external control.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HBUnavailableCharge
Data.Description: Flag used when any of the both estimator can't compute. This flag is configured like a charged vehicule.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HFBadRoadDetecActivFunc
Data.Description: Global activation parameter of the High Frequency bad road detection function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HFBadRoadDetectCountUp
Data.Description: Positive step counter of the High frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HFBadRoadDetectDisFunct
Data.Description: Default High Frequency bad road detection flag value while the function is deactivate.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HFBadRoadThreFlagThreNb
Data.Description: Threshold which defined the maximum of permited flag number before starting the high frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HFBadRoadThreNbSatUp
Data.Description: Upper saturationof the flag threshold counter. Defined in the High frequency bad road detection function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HWFlagBRCorrectThresh
Data.Description: Threshold apply on the signal Vxx_calc_bit_HighWayFlag to check if a High way is detected.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HighWDetActivFunc
Data.Description: Global activation parameter of the HighWaydetection function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_HighWDetNoDetection
Data.Description: This parameter give the value in the case of the HighWay detection function is deactivate

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadDetecActivFunc
Data.Description: Global activation parameter of the Low Frequency bad road detection function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadDetectCountUp
Data.Description: Positive step counter of the owh frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadDetectDisFunct
Data.Description: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadDetectDisFunct

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadThreFlagThreNb
Data.Description: Threshold which defined the maximum of permited flag number before starting the low frequency bad road detection.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_LFBadRoadThreNbSatUp
Data.Description: Upper saturationof the flag threshold counter. Defined in the Low frequency bad road detection function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_MostDynamicMDMode4WS
Data.Description: Threshold used on the signal Vxx_calc_bit_MultiDriveMode4WS. It detect the most dynamic mode use by the 4WS system.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_SMVarFunctionActivation
Data.Description: MAP configuration parameter. Activation of the SwitchModeVariation function.

Data.Name: Nnx_bit_TrailerDetectedCharge
Data.Description: This parameter represente a case of charged vehicule. It's used when a trailer is detected.

Data.Name: Nnx_kg_1SChargeEstHysteresisLo
Data.Description: Lower level for the hysteresis used on the 1 sensor charg estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_kg_1SChargeEstHysteresisUp
Data.Description: Upper level for the hysteresis used on the 1 sensor charg estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_kg_2SChargeEstHysteresisLo
Data.Description: Lower level for the hysteresis used on the 2 sensors charg estimator.

Data.Name: Nnx_kg_2SChargeEstHysteresisUp
Data.Description: Managment software external control command by ESP. Front damper Soft request

Data.Name: Nnx_kph_4WhlRefSpdChargeThresh
Data.Description: Threshold used in the Mass_Estimator function to check the Vxx_est_kph_FourWheelRefSpeed.

Data.Name: Nnx_kph_HighWDet4WhlRefSpdThre
Data.Description: Four wheel reference speed threshold for the activation of the HighWay detection Flag.

Data.Name: Nnx_mA_CmdSupervisionNoCmd
Data.Description: Threhsold used to check if signals command are null.

Data.Name: Nnx_mA_FtConstantControl
Data.Description: Constant command. This control is decide by the management software.

Data.Name: Nnx_mA_ESC_DynamicFt

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: Mode_3_Alert_C
Data.Comment: MMI alert for degraded mode level 3
Data.Description: Parameter to defined if an MMI alert should be put on the dashboard for a degraded mode level 3. If this value is put at 1 : MMI alert on dashoboard if the VADA ECU is in degraded mode level 3 If this value is put at 0 : No MMI alert on dashoboard if the VADA ECU is in degraded mode level 3

Item.Text: No MMI alert for degraded mode level 3
MMI alert for degraded mode level 3

Data.Name: Mode_4_Alert_C
Data.Comment: MMI alert for degraded mode level 4
Data.Description: Parameter to defined if an MMI alert should be put on the dashboard for a degraded mode level 4. If this value is put at 1 : MMI alert on dashoboard if the VADA ECU is in degraded mode level 4 If this value is put at 0 : No MMI alert on dashoboard if the VADA ECU is in degraded mode level 4

Item.Text: No MMI alert for degraded mode level 4
MMI alert for degraded mode level 4
